description:
As a system administrator,
I want the application to automatically detect and discard any financial data entered in the chat,
So that sensitive customer information is never saved in our database or system logs.
acceptance_criteria:
The system actively scans chat inputs for patterns like credit card numbers, bank accounts, or routing numbers.

If found, the data is immediately masked (e.g., replaced with [REDACTED]) before the message is processed or stored by the RAG system.

No raw financial data is written to any backend logs or databases.
